title: Cash Controls Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger cash controls foundations judgment so accounting work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Cash Controls Foundations is a leverage point inside accounting. It supports the broader goal of p&l, balance sheet, tax basics, and bookkeeping hygiene.
coreConcepts: Cash Controls Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good cash controls foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Cash Controls Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
